# SVN McDonald & Company

> Central Florida's premier commercial and land real estate brokerage, specializing in land sales, commercial properties, conservation easements, and investment real estate in Ocala, Marion County, and the surrounding region.

## About

- Location: 217 SE First AVE Unit 200, Ocala, FL 34471
- Phone: (352) 274-3800
- Email: bartow.mcdonald@svn.com
- Website: https://svnmcdonald.com
- Hours: Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM
- Affiliated with SVN International Corp., a national commercial real estate brokerage with 200+ offices

## Services

- [Land Brokerage](https://svnmcdonald.com/services/land-brokerage): Premier land brokerage connecting buyers and sellers across Central Florida.
- [Land Auctions](https://svnmcdonald.com/services/land-auctions): Specialized auction services for land and commercial property sales.
- [Conservation Easement](https://svnmcdonald.com/services/conservation-easement): Navigating conservation easement options for landowners in Florida.
- [Strategic Marketing](https://svnmcdonald.com/services/strategic-marketing): Premium commercial real estate leasing and marketing services.
- [Value & Marketing Positioning](https://svnmcdonald.com/services/value-positioning): Value-driven, strategically positioned brokerage services.
- [Valuation & Broker Opinion of Value (BOV)](https://svnmcdonald.com/services/valuation-appraisal): Accurate property valuations and Broker Opinions of Value (BOV), also known as Broker Price Opinions (BPO), with comprehensive market analysis.
- [Distressed/REO Properties](https://svnmcdonald.com/services/distressed-reo): Identifying and capitalizing on distressed and REO property opportunities.
- [Types of Commercial Real Estate](https://svnmcdonald.com/services/types-of-commercial-real-estate): Overview of office, retail, industrial, multi-family, and specialty property types.
- [All Services](https://svnmcdonald.com/services): Full directory of commercial real estate services.

## Property Types

- [Acreage](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/acreage): Expansive land parcels for agriculture, development, and long-term investment.
- [Commercial](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/commercial): Retail, office, industrial, and investment properties.
- [Equestrian](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/equestrian): Horse farms and equestrian estates in the Horse Capital of the World.
- [Farm & Nursery](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/farm-nursery): Productive agricultural operations and nursery facilities.
- [Hunting & Recreation](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/hunting-recreation): Hunting tracts and recreational land in scenic Central Florida landscapes.
- [Industrial](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/industrial): Industrial facilities and sites along premier logistics corridors.
- [Multi-Family](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/multi-family): Apartment complexes and multi-family investment opportunities.
- [Office](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/office): Professional office space for healthcare, financial services, and businesses.
- [Ranch](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/ranch): Working cattle ranches and lifestyle estates in premier ranching country.
- [Retail](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/retail): High-visibility retail locations and shopping centers.
- [Residential Development](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/residential-development): Entitled land and development sites for residential builders.
- [Self Storage](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/self-storage): Self-storage investment opportunities in a high-growth market.
- [Timber](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/timber): Managed timberland investments in productive pine and hardwood forests.
- [Triple Net (NNN)](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/triple-net-nnn): Passive income investments with creditworthy tenants and predictable returns.
- [Warehouse](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/warehouse): Distribution and warehouse facilities along major freight corridors.

## Markets Served

Each property type is available filtered by location. Example pattern: /properties/{type}/{location}

- [Ocala, FL](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/ranch/ocala-fl): Marion County seat and regional hub. Home to the World Equestrian Center. Population 70,000+, metro 390,000+.
- [Gainesville, FL](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/ranch/gainesville-fl): Alachua County. Anchored by the University of Florida, biotech corridor, and UF Health. Metro 290,000+.
- [Clermont, FL](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/ranch/clermont-fl): Lake County. Commercial gateway to South Lake County, 30 minutes from Orlando International Airport.
- [Marion County, FL](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/ranch/marion-county): 1,663 square miles. Equestrian industry, agriculture, logistics, and manufacturing. Projected 450,000+ by 2035.
- [Lake County, FL](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/ranch/lake-county): I-4 and US 27 growth corridors. 400,000+ population. Competitive pricing vs. Orange and Seminole counties.
- [Alachua County, FL](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/ranch/alachua-county): University-anchored economy with biotech and cybersecurity clusters. 280,000+ population.
- [Sumter County, FL](https://svnmcdonald.com/properties/ranch/sumter-county): Dominated by The Villages (130,000+ residents). Fastest-growing county in Florida. Healthcare and retail demand.

## Team

- [Bartow McDonald IV](https://svnmcdonald.com/team/bartow-mcdonald): Managing Director. MBA & BS, University of Florida. 30+ years in Central Florida real estate. Specialties: Land Brokerage, Conservation Easements, Commercial Sales & Leasing, Investment Properties, Development Land.
- [Matthew Garff](https://svnmcdonald.com/team/matthew-garff): Associate Advisor. BS Economics, Brigham Young University. Specialties: Agricultural Land, Ranch Properties, Recreational Land, Equestrian Properties.
- [Stiles McDonald](https://svnmcdonald.com/team/stiles-mcdonald): Associate. 5th generation Floridian. Specialties: Land Sales, Timber Properties, Hunting & Recreation Land, Rural Properties.

- [Blog](https://svnmcdonald.com/blog): Articles on Central Florida commercial real estate, land investment, market trends, and development.
- [Market Reports](https://svnmcdonald.com/market-reports): Downloadable economic updates and market analysis for Central Florida.
- [Closed Deals](https://svnmcdonald.com/closed-deals): Archive of completed transactions demonstrating brokerage track record.
- [The WEC Effect](https://svnmcdonald.com/wec-effect): Data-driven analysis of how the World Equestrian Center is transforming Ocala-area real estate values.
- [MLS Listings](https://svnmcdonald.com/mls): Current MLS property listings in Central Florida.
- [Contact](https://svnmcdonald.com/contact): Reach SVN McDonald & Company for property inquiries, valuations, or brokerage services.
- [Land Properties](https://svnmcdonald.com/land-properties): All available land listings.
- [Commercial Properties](https://svnmcdonald.com/commercial-properties): All available commercial listings.
